✦ make a wish ✦

a note for you ✦

Yooww HEHEHEH, oum Wait diko alam sasabihin ko, erhghmm erhghm, So um Bago kita batiin, On this beautiful day, I want you to know :THANKS so much sa Gr9 journey natin, i remember kasi ung mga sinabi mo that time sakin na "parang di naman totoo ung mga issues sakin" tapos naging BFF kita HAHAhA, on this day din i want you to know that you bring so much light into the world — into my world. ,thanks din dahil hindi ka nakakapikon/nakakatampo maging seatmate kasi andami mong papel haha de joke lng, Salamat dahil dimoko junudge nung katabi mo'ko, and dimoko nilayuan kasi nga girl-boy), thanks dahil Naging kaibigan kita nung gr9 dahil wala talaga ako masyadong kaibigan non si Mackdave lng and ikaw, the Best ka kasi almost One call away kalang lagi, Dami kong magagamdang experiences with you and madami kang magandang experrience na binigay sa aking life. Anyways malapit kana umalis diko alam if magkikita pa tayo in the future pero atleast sinabi ko this: Thank you, Mag Inggat ka sa Abroad, Wag mo'ko kalimutan hahah,and have Fun there NA'WAY matuto kana mAg spoKening Dollars tapos magkaron ka ng magandang social at mental health don, and lAstly, Every laugh we've shared, every ridiculous adventure, every quiet moment — I treasure all of it.

You deserve every good thing the universe has ever thought of. Happy birthsarry, Aleiyah. May this year be the most magical one yet. 🌸

— natnat
